## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is it for (host, guest reporting
flow, etc.)?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Channel

- [ ] Web portal API (`casero.rem.cu`)
- [ ] USSD / SMS codes
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Neither / UI only

## Additional context

Anything else that helps evaluate the request.
